Package org.eventb.core

Interface IEventBProject

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable
All Known Implementing Classes:
EventBProject
public interface IEventBProject extends org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable
Common protocol for Event-B projects. This interface groups together various methods for accessing to all event-B files of a Rodin project.

Instances of this interface cannot be built directly. The standard way of getting a handle to a Rodin project is to use the adapter factory from a rodin project: 

    IRodinProject rodinProject = ...;
    IEventBProject evbProject = rodinProject.getAdapter(IEventBProject.class);

Another method is to ask for the Event-B project of an Event-B root element: 

    IEventBRoot root = ...;
    IEventBProject evbProject = root.getEventBProject();

This interface is not intended to be implemented by clients.

Since:
1.0

    Method
    Description
    IRodinFile
    getContextFile(String componentName)
    Returns a handle to the unchecked version of the context with the given name.

  • Method Details

    • getContextFile

      IRodinFile getContextFile(String componentName)
      Returns a handle to the unchecked version of the context with the given name.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Parameters:
      componentName - name of the component (i.e, without any extension)
      Returns:
      a handle to the unchecked version of the context

    • getContextRoot

      IContextRoot getContextRoot(String componentName)
      Returns a handle to the root of the unchecked version of the context with the given name.

      This is a handle-only operation.

      Parameters:
      componentName - name of the component (i.e, without any extension)
      Returns:
      a handle to the root of the unchecked version of the context

      Returns a handle to the file containing proof obligations for the component with the given name.

      Returns:
      a handle to the proof obligation file of this component
